sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n266" key="a)gaqofanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγαθο-φανής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n266.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">appearing good, hypocritical,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:82" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">82</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
